title: [FIRRTL] Assertion failure in LowerClasses
body:
I ran into the following (reduced) assertion failure in the `LowerClasses` pass. Consider the following:

``` mlir
firrtl.circuit "Foo" {
  firrtl.class private @Bar(in %chiselClassIn: !firrtl.string, in %paramsIn: !firrtl.string, out %chiselClass: !firrtl.string, out %params: !firrtl.string) attributes {portAnnotations = [[], [], [], []]} {
  }
  firrtl.module private @Baz() {
    %0 = firrtl.string ""
    %Bar = firrtl.object @Bar(in chiselClassIn: !firrtl.string, in paramsIn: !firrtl.string, out chiselClass: !firrtl.string, out params: !firrtl.string)
    %1 = firrtl.object.subfield %Bar[paramsIn] : !firrtl.class<@Bar(in chiselClassIn: !firrtl.string, in paramsIn: !firrtl.string, out chiselClass: !firrtl.string, out params: !firrtl.string)>
    firrtl.propassign %1, %0 : !firrtl.string
  }
  firrtl.extmodule @Foo()
}
```

Running this:

``` console
# circt-opt -firrtl-lower-classes reduced.0.mlir
Assertion failed: (0 && "should be no objects in modules"), function updateInstancesInModule, file LowerClasses.cpp, line 1511.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/circt and include the crash backtrace.
Stack dump without symbol names (ensure you have llvm-symbolizer in your PATH or set the environment var `LLVM_SYMBOLIZER_PATH` to point to it):
0  circt-opt                0x0000000102e5a504 llvm::sys::PrintStackTrace(llvm::raw_ostream&, int) + 56
1  circt-opt                0x0000000102e58138 llvm::sys::RunSignalHandlers() + 204
2  circt-opt                0x0000000102e5b008 SignalHandler(int, __siginfo*, void*) + 300
3  libsystem_platform.dylib 0x000000019a44d6a4 _sigtramp + 56
4  libsystem_pthread.dylib  0x000000019a413848 pthread_kill + 296
5  libsystem_c.dylib        0x000000019a31c9e4 abort + 124
6  libsystem_c.dylib        0x000000019a31bc18 err + 0
7  circt-opt                0x000000010532b714 (anonymous namespace)::PathInfoTable::collectAltBasePaths(mlir::Operation*, mlir::StringAttr, llvm::SmallVectorImpl<mlir::Value>&) const (.cold.2) + 0
8  circt-opt                0x00000001035b8d5c _ZZN12_GLOBAL__N_116LowerClassesPass14runOnOperationEvENK3$_3clIN4mlir9OperationEEEDaPT_ + 6076
9  circt-opt                0x00000001035b913c void llvm::detail::UniqueFunctionBase<void>::CallImpl<llvm::LogicalResult mlir::failableParallelForEach<mlir::Operation**, (anonymous namespace)::LowerClassesPass::runOnOperation()::$_3>(mlir::MLIRContext*, mlir::Operation**, mlir::Operation**, (anonymous namespace)::LowerClassesPass::runOnOperation()::$_3&&)::'lambda'()>(void*) + 128
10 circt-opt                0x0000000103511bac std::__1::__deferred_assoc_state<void, std::__1::__async_func<llvm::unique_function<void ()>>>::__execute() + 48
11 libc++.1.dylib           0x000000019a344a28 std::__1::__assoc_sub_state::wait() + 56
12 circt-opt                0x0000000102e06c1c llvm::StdThreadPool::processTasks(llvm::ThreadPoolTaskGroup*) + 736
13 circt-opt                0x0000000102e0891c void* llvm::thread::ThreadProxy<std::__1::tuple<llvm::StdThreadPool::grow(int)::$_0>>(void*) + 152
14 libsystem_pthread.dylib  0x000000019a413bc8 _pthread_start + 136
15 libsystem_pthread.dylib  0x000000019a40eb80 thread_start + 8
zsh: abort      circt-opt -firrtl-lower-classes reduced.0.mlir
```
